name: 14q22_OTX2_SD
description: OTX2 (orthodenticle homeobox 2) at 14q22.3 sits in a ~3 Mb interval flanked by directly-oriented SDs (10-40 kb modules at 94-98% identity) that mediate recurrent ~2-4 Mb microdeletions causing anophthalmia/microphthalmia and pituitary dysfunction. The proximal flank also harbours BMP4 paralog modules.

architecture.internal_structure: Pairs of 10-40 kb SDs at 94-98% identity flanking OTX2; small BMP4-paralog modules at the proximal edge.
